TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Quwaq = Quwaq seejiq, quwaq ssamac, quwaq Seejiq o, ana manu ka uqun dha quwaq ssamac o, ini mtna ka uqun dha. Quwaq o kika rngagun kari msa.
S.PHON: = quwaq = quwaq səəɟiq, quwaq ssamaʦ, quwaq səəɟiq o, ana manu ka uqun dħa quwaq ssamaʦ o, ini mtna ka uqun dħa. quwaq o kika ɾŋagun kaɾi msa.
S.FORM: = Quwaq = Quwaq seejiq, quwaq ssamac, quwaq Seejiq o, ana manu ka uqun dha quwaq ssamac o, ini mtna ka uqun dha. Quwaq o kika rngagun kari msa.
S.PHON: = quwaq = quwaq səəɟiq, quwaq ssamaʦ, quwaq səəɟiq o, ana manu ka uqun dħa quwaq ssamaʦ o, ini mtna ka uqun dħa. quwaq o kika ɾŋagun kaɾi msa.
